locations.name: 阿根廷
locations.summary: 阿根廷共和国（西班牙語：República Argentina），通称阿根廷（西班牙語：Argentina，發音：[aɾxenˈtina] ），是位于南美洲南部的主权国家。由23个省和布宜諾斯艾利斯自治市组成的联邦共和国，占有南錐體的大部…

locations.name: 萨尔塔省
locations.summary: 萨尔塔省（西班牙語：Provincia de Salta）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷西北部，省会萨尔塔。 萨尔塔省风光

relations.subject: White-browed tapaculo

relations.subject: White-browed tapaculo
relations.evidence: santabarbarae is probably limited to the Santa Bárbara Mountains of Jujuy, though it might also extend into Salta Province. The white-browed tapaculo inhabits the undergrowth of Alnus and Polylepis woodlands, often in shaded rocky ravines
